name: codex-chatgpt-control-repo
description: Public source repo for the unofficial codex-chatgpt-control SDK.

scripts.node:bundle: npm --prefix packages/node run bundle && npm --prefix packages/node run bundle:backend && npm --prefix packages/node run bundle:live-smoke
scripts.node:contracts: npm --prefix packages/node run contract:validate && npm --prefix packages/node run parity:fixtures && npm --prefix packages/node run parity:suite
scripts.python:test: npm --prefix packages/node run bundle:backend && cd packages/python && python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -e ".[dev]" && python -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.python:compile: cd packages/python && python -m compileall -q src examples
